items.statcast_observation: Bobby Witt Jr. produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 107.3 mph at a 24.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the Tampa Bay Rays, KC 4, TB 10. Bobby Witt Jr. led the night, 3-4 | 2 HR, 3 RBI, 2 R in the latest Royals game. Bobby Witt Jr. supplied the loudest Royals contact at 107.3 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Rays Recap
